Appearance:

NO OTHER APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Douglas Grunwald's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas is granted. The court finds there has been no waiver of Plaintiff's right to privacy as to his employment records. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
